units.title: Introduction to Marketing Management
units.description: Foundations of marketing management, the marketing mix, customer value, and the marketing environment.

units.title: Consumer Behaviour
units.description: Cultural, social, personal, and psychological factors that shape consumer decisions and the buying process.

units.title: Market Segmentation, Targeting & Positioning
units.description: How to segment markets, select target segments, and craft a compelling positioning strategy.

units.title: Product & Service Differentiation
units.description: Product levels, branding, differentiation strategies, and managing the product life cycle.

units.title: Pricing Strategy
units.description: Pricing objectives, methods, and strategies including value-based, cost-based, and competition-based approaches.

units.title: Integrated Marketing Communications
units.description: The promotional mix, advertising, digital marketing, and designing cohesive IMC campaigns.
